name: Brandy Snaps
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the syrup, sugar, and butter in a heavy saucepan. Warm over medium heat, stirring until the sugar has dissolved and the butter melted.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the sifted flour, ginger, and lemon rind.
3. Add the lemon juice or brandy and mix well.
4. Drop teaspoonfuls of the mixture 3 inches apart onto greased baking sheets.
5. Bake in a pre-heated moderate oven (325°F) for 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Remove from the oven and roll out on a greased handle of a wooden spoon while hot. Do not allow them to cool as the snaps will become hard and impossible to roll.
